# Server Details

- get server's information in table, json or yaml formats
- select single server by serial, IP or name
- use command options to control amount of details collected from Intersight and shown on the screen
- use --all to get all details
- data is collected using mix of Intersight API, Redfish API, IMC API and UCSM API

Note: The more details you request, the longer it takes to prepare the data.

[Base Information](./ServerDetailsBase.md)

Supported options:
- [Advisory](./ServerDetailsAdvisory.md)
- [Alarm](./ServerDetailsAlarm.md)
- [Board](./ServerDetailsBoard.md)
- [Boot](./ServerDetailsBoot.md)
- [Chassis](./ServerDetailsChassis.md)
- [Connector](./ServerDetailsConnector.md)
- [Contract](./ServerDetailsContract.md)
- [CPU](./ServerDetailsCpu.md)
- [Environmental](./ServerDetailsEnv.md)
- [Fan](./ServerDetailsFan.md)
- [Firmware](./ServerDetailsFw.md)
- [GPU](./ServerDetailsGpu.md)
- [HCL](./ServerDetailsHcl.md)
- [KVM](./ServerDetailsKvm.md)
- [License](./ServerDetailsLicense.md)
- [Memory](./ServerDetailsMemory.md)
- [Networking](./ServerDetailsNetworking.md)
- [PCI Devices](./ServerDetailsPci.md)
- [Power Supply](./ServerDetailsPsu.md)
- [Power Utilization](./ServerDetailsPower.md)
- [Profile](./ServerDetailsProfile.md)
- [Storage](./ServerDetailsStorage.md)
- [Thermal](./ServerDetailsThermal.md)
- [Tpm](./ServerDetailsTpm.md)
- [Workflow](./ServerDetailsWorkflow.md)

Other options:
- [Multiple](./ServerDetailsMulti.md)
- [All details](./ServerDetailsAll.md)
